Witness Name: Diane Wills
Statement No.: WITN09940200
Dated: 22 August 2023

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

SECOND WITNESS STATEMENT OF DIANE WILLS

I, Diane Wills, will say as follows:

Introduction

1 I am the Public Inquiry & Remediation Unit Legal Services Director at Post Office Limited ("POL").

2 This witness statement is made to assist the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry (the "Inquiry") with the matters set out in the Rule 9 request addressed to me and dated 31 July 2023 (the "Request"), which are:
